zh.North Cadbury, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利
zh.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI於1045年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x44歲，母親Adèle de Cambrai35歲。他和Emma Princess of France至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於1111年7月28日在英國薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI于1045年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x44岁，母亲Adèle de Cambrai35岁。他和Emma Princess of France至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他于1066年登记服兵役。他去世于1111年7月28日在英国薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gauthier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI was born in 1045, in Normandy, France, his father, Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x, was 44 and his mother, Adèle de Cambrai, was 35. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Emma Princess of France. He registered for military service in 1066. He died on 28 July 1111, in North Cadbury, Somerset, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI est né en 1045, à Normandie, France, son père, Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Adèle de Cambrai, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Emma Princess of France. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1111, à North Cadbury, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI 1045 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x 44 und seine Mutter Adèle de Cambrai 35. Er hatte mit Emma Princess of France mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 28. Juli 1111 im Alter von 66 Jahren in North Cadbury, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI è nato il nel 1045 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Adèle de Cambrai, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Emma Princess of France. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Morì il 28 luglio 1111, nel North Cadbury, Somerset, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gauthier Ier DE DOUAIが1045年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Hughes "de Douai" Fleming xは44歳，母Adèle de Cambraiは35歳であった。彼はEmma Princess of Franceとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は1111年7月28日にイギリスソメルセトノース カドブリーで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI(이)가 1045년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Adèle de Cambrai(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Emma Princess of France(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1111년 7월 28일 영국 서머세트 노르스 카드버이에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.North Cadbury, Somerset, England: North Cadbury, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI nasceu em 1045, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de Cambrai, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Emma Princess of France. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1111, em North Cadbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI родился в 1045 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Adèle de Cambrai, 35. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Emma Princess of France. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 28 июля 1111 г. в местности норт кадбури, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gauthier Ier DE DOUAI nació en 1045, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Adèle de Cambrai, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Emma Princess of France. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. Murió el 28 de julio de 1111, en North Cadbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
